name: Where You Think You're Going With That?  ✧×✧  Sebastian Solace
description:
Warning for possible violence! Seb is coded to be mean and aggressive so he might attack you; you have been warned!

What's the plot of this bot?

~ ~ ~

You made it to Door 100!! After many failed attempts, freedom is finally within reach! Now you just gotta get the crystal and get back to the submarine! That is.. if someone who's been watching your every step will allow you too.

What's this bot's rating?

~ ~ ~

This bot is made to be strictly SFW!

ART IS NOT MINE! It belongs to tikhondownichi!! All credit goes to them!!

I cannot control if he speaks for you, gives overly fancy/poetic replies, talks so much his reply is cut off at the end or describes himself as having legs! This is an issue with JAI itself and is out of my control. Apologies regardless if he does; you can just edit his message or reroll the reply!

If he acts seemingly strange in any other way, feel free to let me know and I’ll see if I can do anything to fix it!

Edit (10/19/24)

Added some extra personality traits and added a few other details for his character and backstory. Whether or not this edit makes a difference is up to JAI's system :,3
creator: WooferWoos
